hero.title: Secure email signing for your organization
hero.subtitle: PostGuard for Business lets your organization sign and encrypt emails with identity-verified attributes. Manage API keys and maintain full audit trails.

apiKeys.title: API Key Management
apiKeys.description: Create and manage API keys with granular control over which organizational attributes each key signs with.

identity.title: Identity-Based Signing
identity.description: Sign emails with your organization name, KvK number, phone, and email — verified through Yivi.

hostedEU.title: Hosted in the EU
hostedEU.description: All data is stored and processed within the European Union, ensuring full GDPR compliance and data sovereignty.

encryption.title: End-to-End Encryption
encryption.description: Emails are encrypted end-to-end. Only the intended recipient with the right identity attributes can decrypt.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Built on the open-source PostGuard protocol. Full transparency, no vendor lock-in, community-driven.

revocation.title: Email Revocation
revocation.description: Revoke signed emails after sending. Recipients will be notified that the email is no longer valid.

dns.title: DNS Verification
dns.description: Verify your domain ownership and configure DNS records so PostGuard can sign emails on your behalf.

auditLog.title: Email Audit Log
auditLog.description: Full audit trail of every signed email. Revoke emails, track read receipts, and export compliance reports.

cta.title: Ready to secure your organization's email?
cta.subtitle: Register for PostGuard for Business and start signing emails in minutes.

seo.defaultDescription: PostGuard for Business offers enterprise-grade identity-based email signing and encryption for organizations.
seo.homeDescription: PostGuard for Business offers enterprise-grade identity-based email signing and encryption. Manage API keys and audit email activity.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.seoDescription: Transparent per-user pricing for PostGuard for Business. Choose the plan that fits your organization.
pricing.heading: Transparent, all-in pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your organization.

small.name: Small
small.description: For organizations with up to 100 users.

medium.name: Medium
medium.description: For growing organizations with up to 300 users.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For large organizations with specific requirements.

auth.loginSubtitle: Authenticate with your Yivi app to access your organization portal.
auth.loginHint: Disclose your organization email address to log in.
auth.adminLoginSubtitle: Disclose your full name, email address, and phone number to log in as an administrator.
auth.yiviDiscloseAdmin: Please disclose your name, email, and phone number.
auth.yiviDiscloseOrg: Please disclose your organization email address.
auth.yiviFailed: Yivi session failed. Please try again.

register.title: Register
register.seoDescription: Register your organization for PostGuard for Business.
register.heading: Register your organization
register.subtitle: Verify your identity with the Yivi app to register your organization for PostGuard for Business.
register.yiviHint: Please disclose your email, full name, and phone number.
register.submittedMessage: Thank you for registering. We will review your application and get back to you within 2 business days. You will receive a confirmation email once your organization is approved.
register.completeSubtitle: Your identity has been verified. Fill in the remaining details below.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.emptyDescription: Create your first API key to start signing emails.
apiKeys.name: Name

create.title: Create API Key
create.copyWarning: Copy this key now. You won't be able to see it again.
create.keyNameHint: A descriptive name to identify this key
create.signingHint: Choose which organizational attributes this API key will include when signing emails.

organization.title: Organization
organization.changeSubmitted: Change request for {fieldName} submitted. An admin will review it.

emailLog.title: Email Log
emailLog.heading: Email Audit Log
emailLog.noEmailsYet: No signed emails yet. Emails will appear here once your API keys are used.
emailLog.subject: Subject

dns.title: DNS Verification
dns.step1Desc: Add the following TXT record to your domain's DNS configuration:
dns.step2Desc: DNS changes can take up to 48 hours to propagate, though most changes are visible within minutes.
dns.step3Desc: Click the button below to check if your DNS records are configured correctly.

members.title: Members
members.emptyDescription: Add the first member to your organization.
members.name: Name

apiKeys.title: All API Keys
apiKeys.noKeys: No active API keys across all organizations.

settings.title: Settings
settings.prodNotice: Production mode — feature flags are set via environment variables and cannot be changed at runtime.

common.chooseTheme: Choose a theme for this website
